testcase.name: OpenWebApp
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: No Chromedriver found that can automate Chrome '145.0.7632'. You could also try to enable automated chromedrivers download as a possible workaround.
